# PVPWire

> The hub for competitive PvP and esports. Spanning chess, MMO PvP, MOBAs, FPS, fighting games, battle royale, extraction shooters, and modern esports. Cross-genre catalog of every notable competitive title, esports orgs and tournament tracking, aggregated news feed, plus an archive surface for historical guild lineage and legacy editorial.

## Authoritative pages
- [Home](https://pvpwire.com/): live and hot games, current esports tournaments, latest news
- [Live](https://pvpwire.com/live/): every PvP game ranked by current concurrent players, refreshed every 5 minutes via Steam Web API and Twitch Helix API
- [Tools](https://pvpwire.com/tools/): free browser-based tools for competitive gamers, including the Gaming Network Test
- [WiFi (Gaming Network Test)](https://pvpwire.com/wifi/): browser-based gaming network test (ping, jitter, packet loss, DNS, download/upload). No app required. Built for competitive gamers.
- [Games](https://pvpwire.com/games/): every notable competitive PvP game, indexed across thirteen genre categories
- [Esports](https://pvpwire.com/esports/): tournaments, esports organizations, calendar
- [News](https://pvpwire.com/news/): aggregated cross-source feed plus original PVPWire articles
- [Archive](https://pvpwire.com/archive/): historical guild profiles, lineage trees, and legacy editorial pieces
- [Guilds](https://pvpwire.com/guilds/): canonical cross-game guild lineage database (surfaced via Archive)
- [About](https://pvpwire.com/about/): masthead and editorial standards
- [Submit](https://pvpwire.com/guilds/submit/): community guild submission pipeline

## Feeds
- [RSS (full feed)](https://pvpwire.com/rss.xml)
- [RSS (news)](https://pvpwire.com/rss/news.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://pvpwire.com/sitemap.xml)

## What this is not
- Not a per-title vertical (HLTV, Liquipedia)
- Not a news aggregator only (we publish original analysis)
- Not a wiki (the catalog and esports surfaces are editorial, not user-edited)

## Editorial standards
- No em dashes anywhere in published content
- No generic emojis in UI
- New content publishes under the PVPWire Editorial byline
- Submissions are anonymous and moderated; sources are encouraged

## Contact
- Tips: tips@pvpwire.com
- Submissions: https://pvpwire.com/guilds/submit/

PVPWire is an independent publication.
